title: Alexandria's drawing — be your own original — Jul 2019
html:
TL;DR

  • Two-paragraph self-correction note from Jul 28, 2019 — Yahir (16) sees Alexandria Nagy's drawing of "a person or almost a silhouette on a nature landscape background" and notices the urge to mimic her style to impress her. Catches himself mid-impulse: "That's not it chief, be you own original [self], that's how you impress her."
  • Earliest extant articulation of the be your own original concept and the genesis-document for that concept page. The teen-Yahir corrective: refuse mimicry, locate value in differentiation, the impressing-strategy is differentiation, not imitation.
  • Predates the Phoenix→Portland flight letter (Sep 10) by ~6 weeks — meaning the "be your own original" discipline was articulated before he met Alexandria again at the level of needing to silence his feelings for her. The two notes form a paired sequence: rule first, then test of rule.
  • The form is catch-self-mid-impulse — second-person, present-tense, witness-mode. Same internal-camera move that produces the note as letter to self genre, but here applied to a single moment rather than a chapter-end.
  • Sits inside the summer 2019 Alexandria cluster (alexandria nagy) — drawings, "tile for eye for Alexandria" (2019 07 19 get the tile ready for eye for alexandria), "situations with girls after Alexandria" (2019 07 20 figure out situations with girls after alexandria). Three days from this note to the next; she was the central recurring figure of the summer.

Key quotes

"Alexandrias drawing of a person or almost a silhouette on a nature landscape background made you want to impress here and copy her."

"That's not it chief, be you own original nigga, that's how you impress her."

Why it matters in the graph

  • The genesis specimen of be your own original — the line later canonized as identity-construction move #1. Pair with normal neutral to everything (Dec 2018) which is identity-construction move #0: don't be neutral. Together: differentiate AND don't be passive.
  • Establishes the Alexandria-as-mirror function: she's not just a crush, she's the test environment for whether his identity-discipline can survive contact with a person he wants to please. The 2019 flight letter (2019 09 10 low key writing this to end) is the chapter-end of that test.
  • The "chief" address is a Yahir-voice tic that recurs in 2024-2025 notes — pet-vocative as self-distancing tool, used when he needs to coach himself out of an instinct. Same function as "nigga" in this note's body — second-person + slang creates the witness-distance the discipline requires.

Open questions

  • Did Yahir ever show Alexandria his own drawings? Did the discipline hold?
  • The "tile for eye" line (2019 07 19 get the tile ready for eye for alexandria) suggests an actual gift-art project for her — was it ever finished?

Wikilinks

alexandria nagy · be your own original · normal neutral to everything · grants pass teen era · fear of not doing
